basic_details.job_title: Assam Rifles Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 117 Havildar Clerk, Rifleman Mason and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Assam Rifleshas officially released a recruitment notification for Havildar Clerk, Rifleman Mason and More. For all details regarding the recruitment process, eligibility, and application procedure, refer to the official notification. Eligible candidates can download it from the link below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age Limit:18 Years Maximum Age Limit: 25 Years Cut-off Date for Age: 01-01-2026 Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

selection_process: Physical Standar Test Physical Efficiency Test (PET) Trade Test (Skill Test) Written Test Medical Examination Final Merit List

This recruitment is purely under the Compassionate Ground Appointment Scheme. There is no competitive written examination. Selection is based on verification of eligibility as dependent family members of Assam Rifles personnel.

Eligible Categories (only one dependent family member per deceased / medically discharged / missing personnel): Killed in Action (KIA) Died while in service Discharged from service on medical grounds Missing while in service Recruitment Rally: Tentatively scheduled in Jul/Aug 2026 at Lokhra (Assam). Firm date of reporting and detailed instructions will be sent to eligible candidates by registered post / email and uploaded on the official website www.assamrifles.gov.in. Final selection is subject to document verification
medical examination and other formalities as per Assam Rifles rules.
Note: Vacancies are tentative and subject to change. Assam Rifles reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment without assigning any reason.
how_to_apply: Application Mode: Offline (by post) or through email.
Download the prescribed application format from the official Assam Rifles website (www.assamrifles.gov.in) or use the format given in the notification.

Attach self-attested copies of the following documents: Educational certificates Domicile certificate Caste certificate (if applicable) Diploma / Technical / ITI certificate of the trade (as per Qualitative Requirements) One xerox copy of Photo ID (Aadhaar, PAN, Voter ID or Driving Licence)
Diploma / Technical / ITI certificate of the trade (as per Qualitative Requirements)
One xerox copy of Photo ID (Aadhaar, PAN, Voter ID or Driving Licence)
Write “APPLICATION FOR COMPASSIONATE GROUND APPOINTMENT” boldly on the top of the postal envelope.
Send the complete application by post or email to the address below.
Address: DIRECTORATE GENERAL ASSAM RIFLES (RECRUITMENT BRANCH) LAITKOR, SHILLONG, MEGHALAYA – 793010
important_instructions: Only one dependent family member per eligible Assam Rifles personnel can apply. Candidates must be Indian citizens and meet all eligibility conditions as on the cut-off date (01 Jan 2026 for age). All documents must be self-attested; original documents will be checked at the time of rally / document verification. Pay scale and allowances will be as admissible to Assam Rifles personnel. The recruitment rally date and reporting instructions will be intimated separately to eligible candidates only.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are available in Assam Rifles Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 117 vacancies have been announced across multiple posts. The majority of posts are for Rifleman General Duty, along with technical and clerical roles. Candidates should check post-wise vacancy details before applying.

faq.question: Q2. What is Assam Rifles Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Assam Rifles Recruitment 2026 is a government job notification released for 117 vacancies under various posts. These include Havildar Clerk, Rifleman, and multiple technical trades. This recruitment is conducted under the Compassionate Ground Appointment Scheme.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility criteria for Assam Rifles Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have qualifications such as 10th pass, 12th pass, ITI, or Diploma depending on the post. Technical posts require specific trade certifications. Applicants must ensure they meet the required qualifications before applying.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Assam Rifles Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 25 years as on 01 January 2026. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules. Candidates should verify eligibility based on their category.

faq.question: Q5. What is the last date to apply for Assam Rifles Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application is 11 May 2026. Candidates must ensure their applications reach the given address before the deadline. Late submissions will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for Assam Rifles Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Physical Standard Test, Physical Efficiency Test, Trade Test, Written Test, and Medical Examination. Final selection is based on merit and eligibility verification. Candidates must clear all stages to be selected.

faq.question: Q7. Who is eligible under the Compassionate Ground Scheme?
faq.answer: Only dependent family members of Assam Rifles personnel are eligible. This includes families of personnel who were killed in action, died in service, medically discharged, or missing. Only one dependent per family can apply.

faq.question: Q8. How to apply for Assam Rifles Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must apply offline by downloading the application form from the official website. The completed form along with required documents should be sent by post or email. Proper labeling of the envelope is mandatory.
